title: Moving away from Tailwind, and learning to structure my CSS
summary: Author shares their journey ditching Tailwind for structured vanilla CSS. Matters as devs reconsider utility-first tradeoffs. Takeaway: learn CSS architecture before adopting frameworks.

title: SANA-WM, a 2.6B open-source world model for 1-minute 720p video
summary: SANA-WM is a 2.6B parameter open-source world model capable of generating 1-minute 720p videos. Matters for devs building video gen/simulation apps with a lightweight, accessible model. Worth evaluating for real-time content pipelines.

title: Δ-Mem: Efficient Online Memory for Large Language Models
summary: Research introduces Δ-Mem, a method for efficient online memory in LLMs, enabling persistent context without full retraining. Developers can leverage this for stateful apps with lower compute. Explore integrating delta-based memory for long-running LLM agents.

title: DeepSeek-V4-Flash means LLM steering is interesting again
summary: DeepSeek-V4-Flash enables effective LLM steering/prompting techniques. Matters for devs as cheaper models respond well to guidance. Experiment now.

title: Apple Spent $5B on a Vault. Three Guys and an AI Walked Around It in Five Days.

title: Breaking Free From the AI Cloud: Unleashing the Power of Local Servers on Your Laptop or Smartphone.
summary: **Summary:** Article explores running AI models locally on laptops/smartphones instead of cloud APIs. Matters for developers seeking lower latency, privacy, and cost savings. Actionable: Explore local inference tools like Ollama or llama.cpp.
